title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform reliability improvements that make OpsPal run more smoothly behind the scenes. The most significant enhancement is automated system maintenance that keeps your workspace clean and prevents common startup issues. Additionally, we strengthened data quality checks to ensure your automation rules work consistently across all connected systems.

entries.headline: HubSpot agents now have same access permissions as Salesforce agents
Enhanced automation rule validation prevents configuration errors
details: Rules now validate properly before running to prevent failures
Advisory notifications work correctly without blocking other operations
Performance testing ensures rules respond quickly when needed

entries.headline: Automatic system maintenance keeps workspace clean and fast
details: Removes old temporary files that slow down performance
Cleans up incomplete processes that could cause errors
Warns when memory usage tracking files become too large

entries.headline: System automatically removes broken automation components
details: Works across all operating systems and marketplace sources
Finds and removes any broken components regardless of origin
Applies to all plugins not just specific ones

entries.headline: Broken plugins automatically removed during startup
Salesforce startup process now more reliable and cleaner
details: Removed unnecessary testing components that caused confusion
Streamlined connection process for better performance
Added proper cleanup for quality and architecture monitoring tools

entries.headline: Resolved three critical Salesforce automation issues
details: Prevents invisible field errors when Dynamic Forms are active on pages
Automatically assigns proper permissions to new record types to prevent errors
Stops automation rules from blocking sessions due to keyword detection

entries.headline: Missing system components automatically installed during startup
details: Captures detailed information when installations fail
Provides clear instructions for manual fixes when needed
Runs automatic fixes in background for safe installations

entries.headline: Eliminated false warnings about missing system packages
